_publications._publicationTitle: Discovery of a small molecule targeting IRA2 deletion in budding yeast and neurofibromin loss in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cells.

_contextSnippet: UC1 inhibited an erg6Δ ira2Δ strain at an AC50 of 3.6 μM, while the control erg6Δ IRA2 strain was inhibited at 25.6 μM
details: UC1 inhibited erg6Δ ira2Δ strain at an AC50 of 3.6 μM, showing greater sensitivity than control strain
